overall.description: Static shot of a dimly lit cyberpunk apartment bedroom from a video game, featuring a messy bed in the foreground, checkered wall tiles, and a large window revealing a dark neon-lit cityscape outside. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with no movement or action occurring throughout the clip.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static, atmospheric gaze within a dimly lit cyberpunk bedroom that remains frozen in a moody stillness. It begins with a focused view of a messy bed in the foreground, framed by the geometric patterns of checkered wall tiles. As the eye wanders, the composition incorporates a floor lamp and ambient ceiling lighting that cast a soft glow over the interior. The scene then opens toward a large window, revealing a dark, neon-lit cityscape that looms silently outside the apartment.
